name: IaBase
desc: Base definition for an ia.de module service.

name: IaBase.new
desc: Unnamed constructor used to allocate library resources.

name: callbacks
desc: Default module native callback definitions.

name: module
desc: Relevant IaBaseModule with functionality extended by this base class.

name: IaBaseCallbackHandler
desc: Handler method used in conjunction with IaBaseCallbacks.

name: handler
desc: Callback method handler processed with Flutter.

name: methodId
desc: Callback method identifier forwarded from the native module.

name: IaBaseCallbacks
desc: Object defined for handling callbacks received from native app segment.

name: IaBaseCallbacks.new
desc:
Constructs a new instance of the callback handler class,
adding a subscriber instance to the static _subscribers collection.

name: channel
desc: Custom channel specified for callback integration.

name: handlers
desc: Callback handler forwarded to the

name: IaBaseCardLink
desc: Method and property definitions for the ia.de AppSDK CardLink service.

name: analyticsEventListener
desc: Notifier for analytics events.

name: consentEventListener
desc: Notifier for consent events (accepted or declined).

name: deleteAllCards
desc: Deletes all saved cards.

name: deleteAllUserRelatedData
desc: Deletes all user-related data from the CardLink SDK.

name: deleteCard
desc: Deletes a saved card for the specified user.

name: eventListener
desc: Notifier for CardLink lifecycle and interaction events.

name: finish
desc: Programmatically finishes the active CardLink session.

name: getEnvironment
desc: Returns the current CardLink SDK environment.

name: getLogFilePath
desc: Returns the path to the CardLink SDK log file.

name: getSavedCards
desc: Returns the list of saved cards for the specified user.

name: getVersion
desc: Returns the CardLink SDK version string.

name: launch
desc: Launches the CardLink experience.

desc: Relevant IaBaseModule with functionality extended by this base class.

name: prescriptionsRedeemedListener
desc: Notifier for prescriptions redeemed events.

name: IaBaseMethods
desc: Base native method invocation definitions.

name: argumentType
desc: The defined argument type forwarded to the invoke method.

name: channel
desc: MethodChannel class property used for integration with native methods.

name: invoke
desc: Native method invocation definition and handling.

name: methodId
desc: String identifier for the method forwarded to native logic processing executors.

name: IaBaseModule
desc: SDK modules that can be registered for use in the application.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

desc: Method and property definitions for the ia.de AppSDK Ordering service.

desc: Resets the state of user cart, clearing any added products or prescriptions.

desc: Deletes the order history.

desc: Returns the current cart details, or null if the cart is empty.

desc: Launches the cart screen experience on top of the navigation stack.

desc: Relevant IaBaseModule with functionality extended by this base class.

desc: Notifier object implemented for informing the client integration of order completion.

name: orderingDidUpdateCartListener
desc: Notifier object implemented for informing the client integration of cart item changes.

name: transferPrescriptions
desc: Forwards the specified images, pdfs, or eRezept codes prescription collection to the ia.de backend.

name: IaSdkPlatformView
desc: Inline platform view widget that hosts a native SDK component.

desc: Default constructor for creating an instance of IaSdkPlatformView.

desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: selfSizing
desc:
Whether the native component reports its intrinsic content size back to
Flutter. When true (default), the component is wrapped in a
_MeasuredSizeBox that sizes itself to the native-reported dimensions —
suitable for buttons, badges, grids and any component with a finite
intrinsic size.

name: viewId
desc: Identifier for the currently-specified platform view object.
